name: create-react-native-app
description: Creates a new React Native project

options.name: --template
options.description: The name of a template from expo/examples or URL to a GitHub repo that contains an example

options.name: --template-path
options.description: The path inside of a GitHub repo where the example lives

options.name: --yes
options.description: Use the default options for creating a project

options.name: --no-install
options.description: Skip installing npm packages or CocoaPods

options.name: --use-npm
options.description: Use npm to install dependencies. (default when Yarn is not installed)
